recommendations.title: Vampire Sisters 2: Bats in the Belly
recommendations.overview: Teen half vampire Dakaria falls in love with rock singer vampire Murdo. Dakaria, her friends and family have to face vampire Xantor who has dark plans.

recommendations.title: Vampire Hunter D
recommendations.overview: In a far-future time ruled by the supernatural, a young girl requests the help of a vampire hunter to kill the vampire who has bitten her and thus prevent her from becoming a vampire herself.

recommendations.title: Shadow of the Vampire
recommendations.overview: Director F.W. Murnau makes a Faustian pact with a vampire to get him to star in his 1922 film "Nosferatu."

recommendations.title: Embrace of the Vampire
recommendations.overview: An 18-year-old college freshman is seduced by a handsome vampire lover who introduces her to a dark world of carnal desires.

recommendations.title: Buried Alive
recommendations.overview: A college prank at an abandoned house accidentally awakens a frightening spirit.

recommendations.title: Tale of Tales
recommendations.overview: The Queen of Selvascura risks everything to be a mother; the King of Roccaforte falls in love with the voice of a mysterious girl; the King of Altomonte becomes obsessed with a flea and neglects his daughter.

recommendations.title: Monster High: Frights, Camera, Action!
recommendations.overview: When Draculaura is led to believe she's the rightful heir to the vampire throne, she and her best ghoulfriends are whisked away to Transylvania for a royal coronation to die for. But they soon discover the hunt for the queen is not over yet. The Ghou

recommendations.title: Subspecies
recommendations.overview: Three students get caught in the struggle between a good vampire and his evil brother in the Transylvanian mountains.

recommendations.title: BloodRayne
recommendations.overview: In 18th-century Romania, after spending much of her life in a traveling circus, human-vampire hybrid Rayne escapes and plots to take down her father, Kagan, the evil vampire king. When she's discovered by three vampire hunters, she manages to convinc

recommendations.title: Interview with the Vampire
recommendations.overview: A vampire relates his epic life story of love, betrayal, loneliness, and dark hunger to an over-curious reporter.
